name: Herbed Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized pot, heat the oil over medium heat.
2. Add onions and garlic to the pot and stir-fry for 5 minutes, stirring frequently until they are translucent.
3. Add rice and stir to coat with the oil.
4. Pour in water and stir to combine all ingredients.
5. Stir in herbs (dill weed, thyme), salt, pepper, and butter.
6. Bring mixture to a boil over high heat.
7. Reduce heat to low and cover pot; simmer for about 40 minutes, or until the water is absorbed.
8. Check after 30 minutes if there is excess liquid remaining. If so, remove the lid and continue cooking until all moisture is gone.
9. Remove from heat and let rice stand covered in the pot for an additional 15 minutes before serving.
